overview: Prime Health HRT Solutions provides hormone replacement therapy, weight loss medications, peptide therapy, and fertility treatments through online physician consultations and home medication delivery. Patients complete lab work at LabCorp or Quest Diagnostics, then receive a personalized treatment plan via video consultation.
highlights: Fully online consultations and home delivery
Multiple medication formats (injections, creams, troches, oral)
Fast medication delivery within 4-10 business days
targetAudience: Individuals seeking hormone optimization, weight loss management, fertility support, or wellness enhancement through telemedicine.
